module_info.docstring:
P2 Tests: Errors - Invalid Inputs.

Test error handling for invalid inputs across MCP tools.
Verifies clear error messages and appropriate exception types.

Test Cases:
1. Invalid project_key format (relative path rejected)
2. Non-existent project (register_agent, whois, fetch_inbox, search_messages)
3. Invalid agent name format (single word, spaces)
4. Non-existent agent (send_message sender/recipient, file_reservation, whois, fetch_inbox, etc.)
5. Placeholder detection (YOUR_PROJECT, YOUR_AGENT_NAME)
6. Empty recipients list (API allows, returns 0 deliveries)
7. Empty subject (API allows)
8. Invalid contact policy (API normalizes to 'auto')
9. Empty file reservation paths (rejected)
10. TTL below minimum (API warns but allows)
11. Non-existent message (mark_read, acknowledge, reply)
12. Non-existent agent for release/renew reservations
13. Non-existent agent for contact request/respond

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-mj0

functions.name: test_ensure_project_requires_absolute_path
functions.docstring: ensure_project should require absolute path starting with /.

functions.name: test_register_agent_nonexistent_project
functions.docstring: register_agent should fail for non-existent project.

functions.name: test_register_agent_invalid_name_format
functions.docstring: register_agent should reject invalid agent name formats or auto-generate valid ones.

functions.name: test_send_message_nonexistent_agent
functions.docstring: send_message should fail for non-existent sender agent.

functions.name: test_send_message_nonexistent_recipient
functions.docstring: send_message should fail for non-existent recipient.

functions.name: test_placeholder_detection_your_project
functions.docstring: Should detect placeholder values like YOUR_PROJECT - either reject or warn.

functions.name: test_placeholder_detection_your_agent_name
functions.docstring: Should detect placeholder agent names like YOUR_AGENT_NAME - either reject or warn.

functions.name: test_send_message_empty_recipients
functions.docstring: send_message with empty to/cc/bcc returns 0 deliveries (no error).

functions.name: test_send_message_empty_subject
functions.docstring: send_message should handle empty subject gracefully or reject.

functions.name: test_set_contact_policy_invalid_policy
functions.docstring: set_contact_policy normalizes invalid policies to 'auto' (no error).

functions.name: test_file_reservation_ttl_below_minimum
functions.docstring: file_reservation_paths warns but allows TTL below 60 seconds.

functions.name: test_file_reservation_empty_paths
functions.docstring: file_reservation_paths should reject empty paths list.

functions.name: test_file_reservation_nonexistent_agent
functions.docstring: file_reservation_paths should fail for non-existent agent.
